angle.hook: Most content pipelines fail at the approval step.
angle.promise: Show a simple approval-safe pipeline that keeps drafts moving.
angle.proof: Based on the local approval queue and weekly draft review process.
angle.cta: Ask readers what part of their pipeline stalls first.

content.body:
Most content systems do not break because people lack ideas. They break because nobody knows what is allowed to go live.

A safer pipeline has five states:

1. Signal captured
2. Angle selected
3. Platform draft written
4. Approval packet created
5. Scheduled or posted only after approval

That structure keeps creative work fast without letting external actions become casual.
